{{CargoRelic
|name=Dragonfly-woman
|class_id=22141
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=04-05
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Apr 5, 1989 AD, the genius artist Rene Lalique created the Dragonfly-woman brooch.<br>The Dragonfly-woman is a representative work of Rene Lalique. The work, made of gold, ivory, crystals, and other precious gems, depicts a woman's body fused with the tail of a dragonfly. The addition of wings and powerful claws brought the womanly figure a touch of seductive charm. The brooch was popular throughout Europe and widely imitated by other designers and brands.
|fame=34
|art=75
|fth=46
|civ=51
|tech=37
|ss1=Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +12
|ss2=Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +16
|ss3=Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +200<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +20
|ss4=Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28
|ss5=Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +36
|ss7=Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +360<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +36<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion HP +3%
|skill2=[[File:Hamster skill II.png|50px]]Place in Hamster Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion HP +4.5%
}}
